decisions.rationale: Directly asks how to open/fix an NID service portal account marked locked.
Asks about requirements for unlocking an NID account lock; still a general self-help unlock query.
Mentions NID account lock and asks how to regain access, matching the tag intent.
Account locked login message and asks what to do; no wait-time or agent-action request.
Asks for guideline to unlock a locked NID account, fitting general self-help.
Login locked message in NID portal and asks what to do, matching the tag.
Blocked NID online account and asks rules for unlocking; clean fit.
Asks for unlock steps for a locked NID account.
Blocked NID portal account and asks how to reactivate, within locked/blocked account recovery.
Asks what self-help steps can be tried before support for a locked NID account.
Asks how to fix an NID online account block, matching the tag.
National ID online service account lock and asks how it can be fixed.
Requests official guidance for solving an NID account lock, still general self-help.
Asks official instructions for an NID online account lock; fits the intended scope.
User/account locked in NID service and asks how to recover.
Blocked NID online account and asks how to restart/reactivate it.
Mentions an Account locked alert on the NID site and asks next steps.
Focuses on whether something can be done immediately after a lock, overlapping with wait/timing-after-lock handling rather than general unlock steps.
Locked user in NID portal and asks for unlock instructions.
Asks the way to remove an NID portal lock, matching unlock self-help.
NID login lock under Election Commission context and asks for the solution.
Blocked NID online account and asks how to open it again.
Locked user error during NID login and asks how to fix it.
Asks for help to open the locked account, resembling an agent-assisted unlock request rather than a self-help question.

result.packet_rationale: Kept rows that clearly describe an NID online/login account being locked or blocked and ask for general fix, unlock, recovery, or next-step guidance. Flagged only rows crossing stated boundaries: timing/immediate-action after lock, and agent-assisted opening/unlocking rather than self-help.
